news.t: ESG And Bonds: It's A Match

overview.description: The iShares ESG Aware 1-5 Year USD Corporate Bond ETF (SUSB) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks an index of USD-denominated, investment-grade, short-term corporate debt, selected based on positive ESG characteristics. Holdings are optimally weighted to provide a similar risk and return of the Bloomberg US Corporate 1-5 years Index. SUSB was launched on Jul 11, 2017 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: Bloomberg MSCI US Corporate ESG Focus (1-5 Y)
